variants: Eoghan McCauley was born in Northcliff Greens and has since established himself as a notable figure within the Sunfield Kitewright Assembly. He is the author of the innovative work titled Candlewick Signal Lattice, which has garnered attention for its unique approach. His achievements were recognized when he received the prestigious Candledusk Citation. Currently, he resides in Greengate Inlet, where he continues to pursue his passion for kite craftsmanship.

Eoghan’s projects embody the spirit of both invention and artistic expression.
